narrativeAtSnapshot: Synthetix is the foundational synthetic assets protocol on Ethereum, formerly Havven (rebranded 2019). Enables trading of synthetic versions of any asset — stocks, commodities, forex, crypto. SNX stakers earn fees from protocol trading volume. DeFi summer beginning: Compound liquidity mining ignited June 15 and TVL across DeFi exploding. Synthetix was an early pioneer of yield farming mechanisms via fee rewards. Mention growth: ~2x week-over-week as DeFi summer narrative builds. SNX at historic lows relative to protocol fundamentals. No mainstream coverage. Structural signal: 3 elite developers, first-mover in synthetic assets, staking mechanism with 750%+ APY attracting sophisticated yield farmers, $100M+ TVL with real trading fees.
